mapper.sql: ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, lr.building, lr.room AS room
LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN classroom lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM lecture WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND is_del = false AND year != 9999 ORDER BY year DESC
SELECT DISTINCT l.year FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE c.student_code = #{memberCode} AND c.is_del = false ORDER BY l.year DESC
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM lecture WHERE member_code = #{memberCode} AND is_del = false ORDER BY year DESC

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.member_code AS memberCode, l.status, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.credit, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.year, l.semester,
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT l.lecture_id FROM lecture l WHERE l.is_del = false AND l.status = #{status}
AND l.lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%')
ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset} ) paged JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = paged.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN classroom lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lecture WHERE is_del = false AND status = #{status}
AND lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%')

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.member_code AS memberCode, l.status, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.credit, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.year, l.semester,
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT l.lecture_id FROM lecture l WHERE l.member_code = #{memberCode} AND l.is_del = false AND l.status = #{req.status}
AND l.lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.lectureName}, '%')
AND l.year = #{req.year} AND l.semester = #{req.semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset} ) paged JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = paged.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN classroom lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.credit, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.year, l.semester,
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT l.lecture_id FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE c.student_code = #{memberCode} AND l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.year = #{req.year} AND l.semester = #{req.semester}
AND c.created_at < #{req.createdBefore} AND (c.is_del = false OR c.deleted_at >= #{req.createdBefore})
AND c.is_del = false
ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset} ) paged JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = paged.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id
ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.credit, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.year, l.semester,
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT l.lecture_id FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code WHERE l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.year = #{year} AND l.year != 9999
AND (
l.lecture_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lectureName}, '%')
OR pc.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{proName}, '%')
)
AND l.major_id = #{majorId} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset} ) paged JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = paged.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id
ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.major_id AS majorId, mj.name AS majorName, pc.name AS proName, l.year, l.semester, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, l.credit, l.lecture_type AS lectureType, l.ref_books AS refBooks, l.goal, l.weekly_plan AS weeklyPlan, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.status, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, l.member_code AS memberCode, lrj.reason AS rejectionReason, lrj.created_at AS rejectionAt, lrj.updator_code AS rejectorCode, lrj.updator_name AS rejectorName, l.approver_code AS approverCode, l.approver_name AS approverName, lh.change_reason AS cancelReason, lh.created_at AS cancelAt,
FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN lecture_rejection lrj ON lrj.rejection_id = ( SELECT rejection_id FROM lecture_rejection WHERE lecture_id = l.lecture_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN lecture_history lh ON lh.history_id = ( SELECT history_id FROM lecture_history WHERE lecture_id = l.lecture_id AND change_type = 'CANCEL' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 )
WHERE l.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND l.is_del = false

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.member_code AS memberCode, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, pc.name AS proName, l.year, l.semester,
FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code
WHERE l.member_code = #{memberCode} AND l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.is_del = false AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, pc.name AS proName, l.year, l.semester,
FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code
WHERE c.student_code = #{memberCode} AND c.is_del = false AND l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY l.lecture_id

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.lecture_name AS lectureName, lr.building, lr.room, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ats.attendsession_id AS attendSessionId, ats.is_active AS isActive FROM lecture l JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id JOIN classroom lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id LEFT JOIN attendance_session ats ON ats.lecture_id = l.lecture_id AND DATE(ats.class_date) = CURDATE() WHERE l.member_code = #{memberCode} AND l.status = 'APPROVED' AND l.is_del = false AND ls.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY ls.start_period
